tools.name: check_ai_payment_authority
tools.description: Check whether a proposed AI-agent purchase stays inside the user's explicit amount, currency, merchant, consent, expiry and replay boundaries. Call immediately before payment execution. This tool never executes a payment and must not receive card numbers, bank credentials, private keys or personal s

tools.name: verify_cryptographic_payment_authority
tools.description: Fail-closed verification for signed JWS, AP2 SD-JWT or Visa TAP-style HTTP message evidence. Verifies signature, freshness, audience, nonce and purchase bindings, then returns a signed portable decision receipt. Never executes payment.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "check_ai_payment_authority" references sensitive artifacts (private key, credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check whether a proposed AI-agent purchase stays inside the user's explicit amount, currency, merchant, consent, expiry and replay boundaries. Call immediately …

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "check_ai_payment_authority" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
